name: Soba Noodles
recipeIngredient: soy sauce or tamari to taste (2-4 tbsp)
broth, water or wine for sauteing (1/4 cup or so)
1/2 cup dry sherry, rice wine, white wine, or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil for the noodles.
2. Prepare garlic, ginger, carrots, and onion and set aside.
3. Combine sherry (or other liquid) with broth and cornstarch and set aside.
4. Cook noodles in boiling water until done.
5. In a medium pan, saute garlic, ginger, and carrots with soy sauce and broth (water or wine) over moderate heat for 4 minutes.
6. If necessary, add enough liquid to prevent burning.
7. Add green onion and saute for an additional 2-3 minutes.
8. Add reserved liquid and cornstarch, cooking for 2-4 more minutes.
9. Stir in toasted sesame oil and honey, then remove from heat.
10. Check noodles for doneness, drain well, and toss with the sauce.
11. Optionally add mung bean sprouts or sliced cucumber.
